title: Label 309 v1 PoE record
description: The top-level Label 309 Proof-of-Existence record, as decoded from canonical CBOR carried under transaction metadata label 309. A CBOR map whose only required key is `v` (the version, the literal unsigned integer 1; a future major version is rejected as SCHEMA_INVALID_LITERAL). All payload keys are optional at this structural layer: `items[]` (inline content claims), `merkle[]` (Merkle list commitments), `supersedes` (prior-record tx hash), `sigs[]` (optional authorship signatures), `crit[]` (criticality markers). Beyond these base keys the record has an OPEN extension namespace: keys matching `^x-.+` (vendor) or `^[a-z]+-.+` (companion) are admitted; any other unknown key is rejected (SCHEMA_UNKNOWN_FIELD). STRUCTURAL only — the following are NOT expressible here and are domain-pass checks: at least one of items/merkle must be non-empty; crit[] entry shape; registry membership of all algorithm identifiers; and every cross-field invariant of the sub-structures. The extension-key patterns tolerate exactly one trailing newline, mirroring the reference validators.

v.title: Record version
v.description: The Label 309 record version. MUST be the literal unsigned integer 1; any other value is rejected as SCHEMA_INVALID_LITERAL.
